messages.selectStoreInventory: Please select a store to manage inventory

dashboard.title: Inventory Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Track expiry dates and manage your inventory

welcome.title: Welcome to Your Dashboard
welcome.description: Get started with your inventory management by adding your first products. Here are some quick actions to help you get started.
welcome.badge: Let's get started with your inventory

deliveries.title: Add Your First Batches
deliveries.description: Start by adding a batch to your inventory through scanning or manual entry.

settings.title: Configure Your Store
settings.description: Customize your store settings, manage team members, and set up notifications.

products.title: Manage Products
products.description: View and manage your product catalog and inventory settings.

batches.title: Manage Batches
batches.description: View and manage your batches and their inventory.

help.title: Need Help Getting Started?
help.description: Learn how to use the dashboard effectively with our quick tutorial and guides.

quickActions.title: Quick Actions
quickActions.description: Quickly add, remove, or view products and tasks.

addProducts.title: Add Products
addProducts.description: Add new products to your inventory with barcode scanning or manual entry.

todoSuggestions.title: Todo Suggestions
todoSuggestions.description: View and manage tasks suggested by lifo to optimize your inventory.

removeProducts.title: Remove Products
removeProducts.description: Register sales, donations, or waste for items leaving your inventory.

deliveries.title: Inventory Reception
deliveries.description: Scan or enter new items to add them to your inventory. You can scan barcodes, upload a CSV file, or enter items manually.

messages.selectStoreInventory: Please select a store to manage inventory

scanOut.title: Product Removal
scanOut.description: Scan items to remove them from your inventory. Each scan will automatically remove the oldest batch of the scanned product, following the lifo principle.
scanOut.recentlyRemoved: {count, plural, =0 {No items removed} =1 {1 item removed} other {# items removed}}

noStores.title: No Stores Found
noStores.description: You need to create a store before you can manage products. Please set up your first store to continue.

tip.title: Why do I need a store?
tip.description: Stores help you organize your inventory and track products efficiently. Each store can have its own inventory, settings, and team members.

kpis.title: Key Metrics Overview
kpis.errorMessage: Some metrics could not be loaded. Please try refreshing.

deliveryBanner.title: {count, plural, =1 {1 delivery} other {# deliveries}} need expiry dates
deliveryBanner.description: {units, plural, =1 {1 unit} other {# units}} across {count, plural, =1 {1 product} other {# products}}

trends.fewerThanLast: {count, plural, =1 {1 fewer} other {# fewer}} than last period
trends.moreThanLast: {count, plural, =1 {1 more} other {# more}} than last period

emptyState.title: No automation rules configured
emptyState.description: Set up rules to automatically create batches from deliveries

sensitivity.title: Alert Sensitivity
sensitivity.description: How sensitive should alerts be to potential waste?
sensitivity.helpText: Control when items appear in your alerts and dashboard.

descriptions.conservative: Only show critical items requiring immediate action
descriptions.proactive: Early warnings for all items that might need attention

selectDescriptions.conservative: Items expiring today/tomorrow or with high waste risk
selectDescriptions.proactive: All items that might need attention soon

technical.expiryScore: Expiry Score: How close to expiration date
technical.marginScore: Margin Score: Profit margin at risk
technical.velocityScore: Velocity Score: How fast the item usually sells

storeInsights.title: Today's priority actions
storeInsights.description: Review and take action on the most urgent items.

overview.title: Store Overview & Analytics
overview.urgentBatchesAlert: {urgentBatches} urgent batches need immediate attention to prevent losses.

messages.nothingToShow: No urgent items at this time
messages.criticalItemsAction: {count} critical items need immediate action (expired or expiring within 24 hours)
messages.criticalItems: {count} critical items (expired or expiring within 24 hours)
messages.mediumPriorityItems: {count} medium priority items (expiring within a week)

status.allGood: All batches are in good condition

productSort.activeBatchesDesc: Sort by number of active batches
productSort.dateAddedDesc: Sort by when product was added
productSort.datesMissingDesc: Sort by untracked quantity (stock without expiry dates)

productTable.confirmDeleteProduct: Are you sure you want to delete this product?

todos.pageDescription: View and manage your store's todos

descriptions.batches: View and manage your store's inventory batches
descriptions.products: View and manage your store's product inventory

welcome.title: Welcome to lifo AI, {name}!
welcome.subtitle: Track Product by Expiry Dates. Create batches, review expiring items, and receive notifications on expiring batches.

batchTracking.title: Set up expiry date tracking (recommended)
batchTracking.description: Choose how we handle expiry dates for your products

squareConnected.title: Square Connected Successfully
squareConnected.description: Your Square catalog has been synced. Let's set up expiry date tracking.
squareConnected.nextSteps: Next, we'll choose which products to track and how.

syncing.title: Syncing your Square catalog...
syncing.description: This usually takes a few seconds. Please wait while we import your products and categories.

whatToTrack.title: What would you like to track?
whatToTrack.description: Choose which products should appear in your expiry dashboard.

preview.title: Preview your dashboard
preview.sampleInfo: Sample of {count} tracked products · Tilde (~) = estimated from default shelf life

infoBox.message: These are starting defaults. Your team can adjust any date when processing a delivery. You can change all of this later in Settings.

howToTrack.title: How should we track expiration dates?
howToTrack.description: Set a default shelf life for each category. When deliveries arrive, we'll calculate the expiry automatically. Choose "Manual" for categories where you'd rather enter dates yourself.

infoBox.message: These are starting defaults. You can always change them later in Settings.

auto.description: Auto-creates batches with estimated expiry dates based on

manual.description: You'll manually enter expiry dates when processing deliveries

products.noProducts: No products found in this category
products.showingLimit: Showing first 50 products. You can customize more in Settings later.

activating.title: Setting up expiry tracking...
activating.description: We're setting up expiry date tracking for your categories. This will just take a moment.
activating.successDescription: Your expiry date tracking is now configured and ready to go.

success.title: Expiry tracking is on!
success.description: Your expiry date tracking is now configured and ready to go.

summary.title: What we configured
summary.autoDescription: Batches created with estimated expiry dates
summary.manualDescription: Awaiting real expiry dates from deliveries

nextSteps.title: What happens next
nextSteps.step1: When your next delivery arrives,Lifo will auto-create batches with the shelf lives you set
nextSteps.step2: Manual categories will appear in 'Needs expiry dates' until you process deliveries
nextSteps.step3: You can adjust any category or shelf life anytime in Settings

header.title: Set up your expiry tracking
header.subtitle: Configure how Lifo monitors and handles expiry dates

createAccount.title: Account Created
createAccount.success: Your account has been successfully created!

addStore.title: Connect your Square account
addStore.description: Track Product by Expiry Dates. Create batches, review expiring items, and receive notifications on expiring batches.
addStore.descriptionConnected: Track product by expiry dates. Review expiring items, and receive notifications on expiring products.
addStore.squareDescription: Connect your square account to set up real time product tracking by expiration dates
addStore.csvDescription: Real-time data integrations are most powerful, but one-time imports are helpful to backfill historical data or augment your existing data. Learn more about importing People via CSV.
addStore.manualEntryDescription: Add your store information manually by entering the required fields below.

importSummary.title: Import Summary
importSummary.subtitle: Overview of your Square catalog sync
importSummary.configureRules: Choose how we handle expiry dates for your products
importSummary.returnNote: You can always come back to manage your Square connection

integrations.title: Available Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect your POS system to automatically import products and track inventory

addStore.helpNote: Products and categories are imported from your Square catalog. Lifo adds batch-level expiry tracking on top of your existing product data.
